title: $ZIP_KEEPOPEN
text: $ZIP_KEEPOPEN Instructs the Uniface Server to keep every UAR or ZIP archive that it reads open until the Uniface Server itself shuts down. Applicable only in deployment environments. $ZIP_KEEPOPEN Description This setting can only be used in deployment environments, and only with Uniface Servers that never write to a UAR or ZIP files. Do not use $ZIP_KEEPOPEN in a development environment or in an environment where the Uniface Server writes to UAR or ZIP files. If $ZIP_KEEPOPEN is used in a development environment, errors may occur in the IDE because target UARs are locked by a Uniface Server. $ZIP_KEEPOPEN makes it faster to access remote resources. You can improve performance further by setting $MEMORY ZIP =all , which maps archives into memory. Related Links $MEMORY Control memory allocation for Uniface application. Was this topic helpful?
